skipRateConcern: 122/185 = 66% of cases skipped across all 4 sub-agents. Pattern: agents self-scoped to VCST-4713 critical path. Investigate whether suite manifests have wrong agent assignments (e.g., admin-creation E2E cases may belong in 052 rather than 072b).
